market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your stylish serviced apartment in the heart of Newcastle City Centre. This entire home offers two comfortable bedrooms and a fully equipped living area, making it perfect for up to four guests. Situated just minutes from the main attractions, shops, and transport links, you’ll enjoy the convenience of city‑centre living while staying in a quiet, modern space.

Each bedroom features a plush double bed with fresh linens, and the living room provides a cozy sofa and a flat‑screen TV for relaxing after a day of exploring. The kitchen is fully stocked with appliances, cookware, and utensils so you can prepare meals just as you would at home. A clean, contemporary bathroom includes a shower, toiletries, and fresh towels.

At £70 per night, you’re paying roughly 60 % less than the market median of £175, delivering exceptional value for a prime location. While the listing has a modest 2.6 rating from five reviews, recent guests have praised the cleanliness and convenient location. Host Sunshine Glory is a new host eager to provide a welcoming experience. Book now to secure one of the limited open nights and enjoy Newcastle’s vibrant culture, dining, and nightlife from a comfortable base.

We look forward to hosting you!
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑composed shot of the living area with a view of the city as the cover photo – it instantly showcases the central location and the apartment’s style.
key_diagnosis: Shorten the title to under 50 characters and highlight the -60% price advantage – the current 56‑char title lacks a strong price hook.
Add high‑value amenities such as outdoor space, parking, and entertainment; currently none are listed, and these categories drive bookings in the Newcastle market.
Upload a complete set of high‑resolution photos covering every room and set a city‑view living‑room image as the cover – photo count is unknown, likely missing, which hurts click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your 16.3% occupancy at a £70/night rate is far below the market average, indicating a huge upside if you improve visibility.
